items.title: San Antonio Spurs after signing Tobias Harris, Harrison Barnes, and Julian Champagnie.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
San Antonio Spurs after signing Tobias Harris, Harrison Barnes, and Julian Champagnie.

They still have the bi-annual but may use last roster spots on minimums instead to avoid the luxury tax.

All that's left to do this offseason: Sign Victor Wembanyama to a maximum extension.

items.title: #Spurs elder statesman Harrison Barnes has a message for his younger teammates: Don’t take being in the NBA Finals for granted.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
#Spurs elder statesman Harrison Barnes has a message for his younger teammates: Don’t take being in the NBA Finals for granted.

“This may be the last time both teams are in the Finals for a while. We have no idea,” Barnes said.

Post-shootaround report:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Harrison Barnes warns younger Spurs not to take Finals berth for granted
media.description: The 14th-year pro cautioned that playing on the big stage as a young player is no guarantee of year-after-year success.
